name: 15q14_GREM1_SD
description: 15q14 region encompassing MEIS2 and the GREM1/SCG5 colorectal-polyposis locus. Carries small directly-oriented SDs (5-20 kb at 92-96% identity) flanking GREM1 that mediate rare upstream tandem duplications associated with hereditary mixed polyposis syndrome (HMPS).

architecture.internal_structure: 5-20 kb SD pairs at 92-96% identity flanking GREM1; SCG5-GREM1 intergenic 40 kb tandem duplication is the HMPS founder allele in Ashkenazi Jewish families.
